data.content:
### Enable Accessibility Layer for Charts

Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/chart.mdx

Demonstrates how to add an accessibility layer to a chart component, such as `LineChart`, using the `accessibilityLayer` prop. This feature enhances keyboard navigation and screen reader support for the chart.

```tsx
<LineChart accessibilityLayer />
```
